visual_notes: Gem-quality crystals prized as ruby and sapphire. Non-gem material is gray-brown and often massive. Silk inclusions produce asterism in star rubies and sapphires.
prompt_fragments: midnight blue of sapphire iron-titanium charge transfer
vibe_notes: Corundum occupies the extreme end of mineral hardness and gem value. Ruby and sapphire represent fire and sky — the two poles of corundum's chromatic identity.
folklore_summary: Rubies were called 'ratnaraj' (king of gems) in Sanskrit texts. Sapphire was associated with divine favor in medieval European Christianity.
